creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #12)
I tried the new version on a different monitoring interface on my IDS. iftop sees some of the IPv6 traffic. Two SPAN ports on my core switch are feeding bce0 and bce1 on the IDS. (Yes, I know, SPAN ports have their own problems.) bce0 receives external traffic, while bce1 receives internal traffic. Maybe the volume of IPv4 traffic displaces any IPv6 traffic on bce0 when viewed with iftop. I thought connections with the highest transfer rates would bubble up to the top lines in the display regardless of IPv4 or IPv6.
